mission.title: inspektor-gadget: treewide: Remove built-in gadgets.
mission.description: This commit also removes the gadgettracermanager controller, as we no more need it since it was only used to run built-in gadgets.

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
I may have removed something needed for this field.
> The problem with advise_networkpolicy is specific to the podIP field, with the following patch, the test pass:

Thats weird. The field gets created by the `KubeNameResolver` operator, which has a lower priority (therefore runs first). It is also enabled in the gadget config
